notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 28 CVEs: CVE-2021-47461, CVE-2022-48637, CVE-2022-48796, CVE-2022-49058, CVE-2022-49111, and 23 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
